   "source": [
    "# Flower plot"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "86e5f131",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [

     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Matplotlib is building the font cache; this may take a moment.\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 500x800 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 1, figsize=(5, 8), subplot_kw={\"projection\": \"polar\"})\n",
    "theta = np.arange(0, 2 * np.pi, 0.01)\n",
    "r = np.sin(5 * theta)\n",
    "ax.set_rticks([])\n",
    "ax.set_thetagrids([])\n",
    "ax.plot(theta, r);\n",
    "ax.plot(theta, np.full(len(theta), -1));"
   ]
  }
 ],
